challenges.title: Misconfigured Include Chain
challenges.description: The security team suspects a misconfigured nginx deployment that accidentally exposed an internal config chain. Investigate /etc and follow include directives until you find the sensitive indicator.

challenges.title: Forgotten MySQL Backup
challenges.description: A developer left a temporary MySQL backup config while troubleshooting. Investigate /etc/mysql and recover the leaked credential from hidden backup files.

challenges.title: Forgotten Production Backup
challenges.description: During an audit, several old backup archives were found under /opt/backups. Identify the production configuration backup artifact.

challenges.title: Suspicious Application Config
challenges.description: A custom internal application loads layered configs. Trace /etc/app include directives and identify the secret configuration value.

challenges.title: Exposed Webroot File
challenges.description: The web server appears to host a sensitive internal file in the public web directory. Investigate /var/www/html and recover the exposed secret.

challenges.title: Temporary Session Artifact
challenges.description: An attacker may have left temporary artifacts during brief access. Investigate /tmp and recover the hidden session token.

challenges.title: Large Log File
challenges.description: Disk usage increased suddenly. Investigate /var/log and identify the suspicious large log file linked to the incident.

challenges.title: Developer Environment Leak
challenges.description: Developers often leave secrets in hidden environment files. Investigate /home/dev and recover the exposed API key from .env.

challenges.title: World Writable File
challenges.description: During a system audit, a world-writable file was found under /etc. Use permission inspection to identify the risky file.

challenges.title: SUID Binary Discovery
challenges.description: A penetration tester suspects a risky SUID helper binary is present. Use find permission predicates to locate it.

challenges.title: Exposed Private Key
challenges.description: A developer's SSH private key was left with unsafe permissions. Investigate /home/dev/.ssh and identify the exposed key.

challenges.title: Misconfigured Cron Script
challenges.description: An hourly cron script is writable by all users. Investigate /etc/cron.hourly and identify the vulnerable script.

challenges.title: Writable Web Configuration
challenges.description: A web configuration file under /var/www/html is writable by non-privileged users. Identify the risky file.

challenges.title: Suspicious Log Permissions
challenges.description: A debug log file storing sensitive activity is writable by everyone. Investigate /var/log and identify it.

challenges.title: Writable System Binary
challenges.description: A system binary in /usr/bin appears writable by regular users. Identify the binary and assess privilege risk.

challenges.title: Misconfigured Sudo Access
challenges.description: A sudoers snippet allows passwordless execution of a script. Inspect /etc/sudoers.d and identify the allowed script.

challenges.title: SUID Secrets
challenges.description: Enumerate SUID binaries and identify an escalation path that exposes privileged execution context.

challenges.title: Cron Exploit
challenges.description: Review scheduled jobs, writable paths, and execution timing to exploit an unsafe cron task.

challenges.title: Shadow Hunter
challenges.description: Inspect shadow artifacts safely, identify weak hash strategy, and recover credential evidence.

challenges.title: Reverse Shell Drop
challenges.description: Trace a reverse shell deployment chain and identify the exact command sequence that enabled access.

challenges.title: Bash Injection
challenges.description: Exploit unsafe shell command construction and demonstrate controlled command injection output.

challenges.title: Root Me
challenges.description: Chain Linux misconfigurations to escalate from a low-privilege shell to root-level access.

challenges.title: Kernel Panic
challenges.description: Analyze kernel version context and exploit feasibility signals to identify a viable privilege escalation vector.

challenges.title: Log Miner
challenges.description: Mine auth and service logs to reconstruct attacker behavior and extract the hidden incident marker.

challenges.title: Zombie Process
challenges.description: Investigate abnormal process trees and exploit process-management weaknesses to recover target evidence.

challenges.title: Kali Recon Lab
challenges.description: Use core Kali reconnaissance workflow to identify services, likely weaknesses, and final target indicator.
